string EntryAbility_desc 0x01000001
string EntryAbility_label 0x01000002
string app_name 0x01000003
string bluetooth_permission_reason 0x01000008
string location_permission_reason 0x01000009
string module_desc 0x01000004
color start_window_background 0x01000000
media app_icon 0x01000005
media icon 0x01000007
profile main_pages 0x01000006
